authorized_changes.scope: recognize any versioned .confirmatory/vN state root while keeping replay output outside every immutable confirmatory state
bind the exact amended V5 claim, Modal app/call, Volume-B launch receipt, terminal status, failed curve gate, and root/evidence inventories to tracked files whose bytes are SHA-256 verified
describe the named and total reward as the weighted sum of two separately clipped component z-scores with range [-6.25, 6.25]
add regression/smoke tests and update only hashes derived from changed executable bytes

knowledge_boundary_at_correction.root_operator: root had seen partial results for six V5 seeds before this correction
knowledge_boundary_at_correction.timing: the correction was frozen before root saw a V5 aggregate or terminal result
knowledge_boundary_at_correction.v6_outcomes: no V6 training, curve, control, or sealed-final outcome existed
knowledge_boundary_at_correction.selection_effect: the additional V5 partials did not alter the already selected celebration recipe, curve nodes, seeds, controls, data repartition, acceptance rules, or W&B identities

outcome_status_at_correction: prelaunch V6 correction; no V6 outcome existed or was inspected
prohibited_changes: target words or any J-lens layer, position window, stride, calibration, sign, or weight
model/dataset revisions, optimizer settings, fixed horizon, curve nodes, or curve criterion
curve/final/reserve allocations, seeds, matched-control construction, estimands, bootstrap, sign test, or acceptance thresholds
W&B entity, project, group, tags, run prefix, or any run ID
fresh V6 Volume, one-L40S cap, or no-overlap policy

scientific_projection.required_v2_relationship: the canonical projection over these fields must be byte-semantically identical in V1 and V2
